summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ri'DN Partner Dashboard booking flow. All features working correctly - public booking page, Slot Manager views, Bookings page, and Finance page integration.
critical_code_review_comments: Public booking flow correctly passes outlet_id to backend
Resource-bookings endpoint properly filters by outlet and date
Transactions are automatically created with 15% commission when bookings have amount > 0
Slot Manager Day/Week/Month views all working correctly
Multi-service selection working with correct total calculations
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data with embed_token: e5ecac3e-9880-4402-800b-b9cf9a4aeb6b
context_for_next_testing_agent: All booking flow features verified working. Public booking creates bookings that appear in Slot Manager, Bookings page, and Finance page. Day/Week/Month views in Slot Manager all functional.

public_booking_page_loads.details: Public booking page loads at /b/{embed_token} with outlet info, services, and time slots

public_booking_form_submission.details: Form submission works - select resource, date, time, service, fill customer info, confirm booking

public_bookings_in_slot_manager.details: Public bookings appear in Slot Manager Day view with customer name, service, and duration

public_bookings_in_bookings_page.details: Public bookings appear in All Bookings list with booking ID, customer, time, amount, status

public_bookings_create_transactions.details: Transactions created with correct gross, commission (15%), and partner share

slot_manager_day_view.details: Day view shows timeline with time markers, resource columns, and booking cards

slot_manager_week_view.details: Week view shows 7 days with booking counts and booking cards per day

slot_manager_month_view.details: Month view shows calendar grid with booking count badges

booking_creation_from_slot_manager.details: Work Order button opens modal, can fill customer details, select services, create booking

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real MongoDB database
